name: fullstack-py
description: Full stack web app with Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend

tasks.name: Backend scaffold
tasks.description: Create the FastAPI app entry point with CORS configured, a health check route, and a requirements.txt with all backend dependencies pinned

tasks.name: Pydantic schemas
tasks.description: Define all Pydantic request and response models needed for the API based on the data shapes described in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: Data loader
tasks.description: Implement functions to load and validate input data from uploaded files or request payloads using the Pydantic schemas

tasks.name: Metrics engine
tasks.description: Implement all metric calculation functions as described in PROJECT.md, operating on validated schema objects and returning typed results

tasks.name: Metrics tests
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for every function in metrics.py covering normal inputs, edge cases, and expected output values

tasks.name: Scoring engine
tasks.description: Implement the scoring logic that aggregates metric outputs into a final score or rating according to the rules in PROJECT.md and DECISIONS.md

tasks.name: Scoring tests
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for every scoring function covering boundary conditions, weighting logic, and expected score outputs

tasks.name: Alternatives engine
tasks.description: Implement logic to find and rank alternative options based on the criteria and data structures defined in PROJECT.md

tasks.name: Alternatives tests
tasks.description: Write pytest unit tests for the alternatives engine covering ranking logic, tie-breaking, and empty result cases

tasks.name: Parsing service
tasks.description: Implement input parsing and normalisation functions that transform raw user input into validated schema objects ready for analysis

tasks.name: Analyze endpoint
tasks.description: Wire the POST /analyze-fund route in main.py to call parsing, metrics, scoring, and alternatives services and return a complete typed response

tasks.name: Frontend scaffold
tasks.description: Create the Next.js app shell with a root page, a typed API client module, and shared TypeScript types mirroring the backend response schemas

tasks.name: Analyze form
tasks.description: Build a controlled form component that collects all required user inputs, validates them client-side, and calls the API client on submit

tasks.name: Result card
tasks.description: Build a result display component that renders all analysis output fields from the API response in a clear, structured layout

tasks.name: Charts
tasks.description: Add a chart component inside ResultCard that visualises the key metrics data using a lightweight charting library already in the project

tasks.name: Disclaimer component
tasks.description: Create a disclaimer component with the required legal or contextual notice text from PROJECT.md and render it on the main page

tasks.name: Loading and error states
tasks.description: Add loading spinner during API calls and error message display when the API returns an error or the request fails, updating page.tsx in place

tasks.name: Connect frontend to backend
tasks.description: Configure the API client base URL, verify the request and response shapes match, and confirm end-to-end data flow from form submission to result display

tasks.name: Integration test
tasks.description: Write a pytest integration test that sends a real HTTP request to the running FastAPI app and asserts the full response shape and key field values

tasks.name: Bug sweep and freeze
tasks.description: Review all listed files for type mismatches, missing error handling, and broken imports then output a list of every fix applied with file and line references
